zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Blount於1418年出生在英國英格蘭史洛普爾金萊特時，他的父親John Blount III34歲，母親Alice Alicia Maud Bere24歲。他和Catherine Corbet至少有1個女兒。他去世於1479年在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾索丁頓享年61歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Blount于1418年出生在英国英格兰史洛普爾金萊特时，他的父亲John Blount III34岁，母亲Alice Alicia Maud Bere24岁。他和Catherine Corbet至少有1个女儿。他去世于1479年在英国英格兰武斯特斯爾索丁頓享年61岁。

nameMeanings.name: Blount
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Blunt
meanings: English: nickname for someone with fair hair or a light complexion, from Old French blund, blond (from Latin blondus) ‘blond, fair, yellow-haired’, used also of complexion.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Blount was born in 1418, in Kinlet, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Blount III, was 34 and his mother, Alice Alicia Maud Bere, was 24. He had at least 1 daughter with Catherine Corbet. He died in 1479, in Sodington, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 61.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Blount est né en 1418, à Kinlet, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Blount III, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Alice Alicia Maud Bere, avait 24 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fille avec Catherine Corbet. Il est décédé en 1479, à Sodington, Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 61 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Blount 1418 in Kinlet, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Blount III 34 und seine Mutter Alice Alicia Maud Bere 24. Er hatte mit Catherine Corbet mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb 1479 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Sodington, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Blount è nato il nel 1418 nel Kinlet, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, John Blount III, aveva 34 anni e il suo madre, Alice Alicia Maud Bere, aveva 24 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlia con Catherine Corbet. Morì nel 1479, nel Sodington, Worcestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 61 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Blountが1418年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアキンレットで生まれた時，父John Blount IIIは34歳，母Alice Alicia Maud Bereは24歳であった。彼はCatherine Corbetとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1479年にイギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアソディントンで61歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Blount(이)가 1418년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 킨렛에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Blount III(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Alicia Maud Bere(은)는 24세였다. 그는 Catherine Corbet(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1479년 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 소딩턴에서 61세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Blount nasceu em 1418, em Kinlet, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Blount III, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Alice Alicia Maud Bere, tinha 24 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filha com Catherine Corbet. Ele faleceu em 1479, em Sodington, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 61 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Blount родился в 1418 г. в местности кинлет, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Blount III было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Alice Alicia Maud Bere, 24. У него была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Catherine Corbet. Он умер в 1479 г. в местности содингтон, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 61 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Blount nació en 1418, en Kinlet, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John Blount III, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Alice Alicia Maud Bere, tenía 24 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija con Catherine Corbet. Murió en 1479, en Sodington, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 61 años.
